Describe the visual progression of the sword showcase from the intro to the detailed handle views.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a logo with orange and black text appears; at 2s, a full katana lies on a textured mat; at 4s, white text identifying the Snake Katana overlays the screen; at 8s, the view zooms into the white wrapped handle; and at 18s, a gold collar near the pommel becomes visible.
